required_contains.text: Subnet creation is also paced by a network registration rate limit. The rate-limits reference lists
`NetworkRateLimit` as a 14,400-block interval, about two days, between successful new-subnet
registrations; the create-a-subnet guide notes that the live value can be queried from
`subtensorModule.networkRateLimit()`. A creator therefore needs both enough TAO for the current burn
and enough blocks since the previous subnet registration
